pages.text: Basic starts are open: Create shafts and early machines, Ars spellbook/source basics, AE2 charger/inscriber, Mekanism infuser, Farmer's Delight cooking, and early Mystical Agriculture are not the main gates.
Gates focus on scaling: autocrafting, advanced machine frames, QIO, teleporters, digital mining, quantum networking, high-tier bees/crops, aircraft weapons, compact space and creative-adjacent items.
